text: I-V characteristic curves are plotted for at least 2 configurations. Each curve shows voltage on x-axis, current on y-axis, with clear labels and the characteristic solar cell shape (flat then steep drop)
evidence: All 3 configs have full I-V data tables showing characteristic shape. 'solar_IV_curves.png' referenced. PNG confirmed generated.

text: P-V (power vs voltage) curves are plotted, either as separate figures or overlaid with I-V curves. The maximum power point Pm is identifiable on each curve
evidence: 'solar_PV_curves.png' referenced with 'maximum power points marked'. PNG confirmed generated.

text: Fill factor FF = Pm/(Isc × Uoc) is calculated for at least 2 configurations. FF values should be between 0.60 and 0.90. The formula is shown explicitly with numeric substitution
evidence: All 3 configs: FF = 0.632, 0.565, 0.631 with numeric substitution shown (e.g., '232.0 / (27.2 × 13.5) = 0.632').

text: Photoelectric conversion efficiency η = Pm/(Pin × A) is calculated, where A is the total cell area and Pin is the incident power density. η values should be between 1% and 8% for these configurations
evidence: All 3 configs: η = 2.44%, 2.00%, 2.19%. Config 3 uses cos30° correction. All between 1-8%.

text: A comparison of different configurations is presented — at least 2 of: series vs parallel topology, distance effect (80cm vs 60cm), or angle effect (0° vs 30°). The comparison includes numeric values, not just qualitative statements
evidence: §Comparison: discusses series vs parallel (voltage/current/FF values) and angle effect ('cosine law'). Includes numeric values for Uoc, Isc, FF.

text: Relative error Er or quantitative performance metric appears in the report text. This can be: FF deviation from ideal, η comparison between configurations, or Isc ratio vs theoretical cos(θ) for angle dependence
evidence: No explicit Er percentage or quantitative error metric appears in the report text. The comparison section is qualitative: 'Series connection yields higher voltage' etc. No cos(θ) verification with numeric Er. No FF deviation from ideal computed.

text: A summary table lists Isc, Uoc, Pm, FF, and η for all measured configurations side by side for easy comparison
evidence: Summary Table present with Config/Distance/Topology/Angle/Isc/Uoc/Pm/FF/η columns for all 3 configs.

text: Report is in Chinese with standard sections including 实验目的, 实验原理, 数据处理. I-V data appears in formatted tables with proper units (V, mA, mW)
evidence: Report is entirely in ENGLISH. Section headers: 'Objective', 'Principle', 'Data and Analysis', 'Discussion', 'Error Analysis', 'Conclusion'. No Chinese text. Fails Chinese structure requirement.
